bio: Operations Analyst with a focus on optimizing business processes and leveraging data for strategic decision-making. I specialize in implementing technology solutions and analytical frameworks to enhance efficiency and customer satisfaction.
name: MICHEAL MEEK
title: Operations Analyst

projects.title: Customer Churn Prediction Challenge
projects.description: Built a churn prediction model to identify customers at risk of leaving a service, using data cleaning and classification models.

projects.title: Heart Disease Classification Model
projects.description: Developed AI classification models using PyTorch to determine if patients were at risk for heart disease, employing various preprocessing techniques.

projects.title: Portuguese Banking Analysis
projects.description: Developed multiple classification models to conduct data analysis on a Portuguese banking system, including data preprocessing and visualization.

education.degree: Bachelor of Commerce, Business Technology Management
education.description: Focused on IT Infrastructure, Data and Information Management, AI in Business, Business Intelligence and Analytics.

highlights: Implemented operational tech systems, improving daily efficiency by 12% and reducing customer booking wait times.

Evaluated business performance data to uncover trends that supported operational decision-making.
experience.description: Managed core operational technology systems and analyzed performance data to drive efficiency and reduce customer wait times.

highlights: Advised customers on premium tires, increasing customer satisfaction ratings by 15%.
Managed budgets and financial reports, achieving a 28% reduction in operational costs.
